title: Anonymous storage exposure in IaC What-If only

execution.limitation: This scenario is intentionally offline and must never create an Azure storage account or anonymous data endpoint.

preconditions: Verify allowBlobPublicAccess is false and secure transfer is true
baseline: Run deterministic IaC rules on the compliant template
injection: Change allowBlobPublicAccess to true in a non-deployable fixture
Run Bicep build and What-If/rule evaluation without deployment credentials

expected.observation: The proposed template permits anonymous blob access.

remediation: Retain the negative fixture for CI regression testing
retest: Recompile and require the compliant template to pass
Require the negative fixture to continue failing
cleanup: Verify no Azure resource ID was produced
Keep only sanitized fixture and test output
